zh.Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Maud Berkeley於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭爾加特利時，她的父親Humphrey de Berkeley34歲，母親Agatha31歲。她和Máel Coluim Earl of Angus至少有2個女兒。她去世於1228年在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾享年29歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom: 英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Maud Berkeley于大约1200年出生在英国英格兰爾加特利时，她的父亲Humphrey de Berkeley34岁，母亲Agatha31岁。她和Máel Coluim Earl of Angus至少有2个女儿。她去世于1228年在苏格兰Forfarshire福爾法爾享年29岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Maud Berkeley was born about 1200, in Gatley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Humphrey de Berkeley, was 34 and her mother, Agatha, was 31. She had at least 2 daughters with Máel Coluim Earl of Angus. She died in 1228, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 29, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Maud Berkeley est née environ 1200, à Gatley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Humphrey de Berkeley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agatha, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Máel Coluim Earl of Angus. Elle est décédée en 1228, à Forfar, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Maud Berkeley um 1200 in Gatley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey de Berkeley 34 und ihre Mutter Agatha 31. Sie hatte mit Máel Coluim Earl of Angus mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1228 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Maud Berkeley è nata il circa 1200 nel Gatley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Humphrey de Berkeley, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Agatha, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Máel Coluim Earl of Angus. Morì nel 1228, nel Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Maud Berkeleyが約1200年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガトリーで生まれた時，父Humphrey de Berkeleyは34歳，母Agathaは31歳であった。彼女はMáel Coluim Earl of Angusとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1228年にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルで29歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Maud Berkeley(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey de Berkeley(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Máel Coluim Earl of Angus(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1228년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Maud Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Gatley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Humphrey de Berkeley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agatha, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Máel Coluim Earl of Angus. Ela faleceu em 1228, em Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Maud Berkeley родилась около 1200 г. в местности гатли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Humphrey de Berkeley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Máel Coluim Earl of Angus. Она умерла в 1228 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Maud Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1200, en Gatley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Humphrey de Berkeley, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agatha, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Máel Coluim Earl of Angus. Murió en 1228, en Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.
